boilerplate_cleanup_rules: Remove navigation, cookie, subscription, share, and newsletter boilerplate.
Remove repeated source labels and duplicated article headers.
Remove warning markers such as Fetch failed, Paywall, and warning symbols from model-facing text.
Remove source/provenance prefixes from model-facing text while preserving provenance in selection_notes.json.
Keep article-body evidence, dates, company names, product mechanics, quoted claims, and risk/caveat language.

quality_rules.analogue: Allowed only for nuance or distractor roles unless expert review explicitly approves otherwise.
quality_rules.core: Core evidence articles must use exact or near_exact full text.
quality_rules.local_summary: Allowed only for nuance or distractor roles unless expert review explicitly approves otherwise.
quality_rules.unusable: Article must be replaced before model-facing inputs are built.

full_text_policy.short_source_exception_policy: If the local source artifact is shorter than 1,500 characters, the exception must be documented with full_text_quality_notes.
full_text_policy.soft_cap_exception_policy: Text longer than the soft cap can be retained only with cleaning notes explaining why truncation would remove important evidence.

schema_examples.cleaning_notes: Removed navigation boilerplate and repeated title.
schema_examples.full_text_quality_notes: Complete local article text is available after boilerplate cleanup.
schema_examples.selection_rationale: Example of a core evidence article with complete text.

schema_examples.cleaning_notes: Merged local article excerpt with matching raw item text.
schema_examples.full_text_quality_notes: Local text appears to preserve the article body but may omit minor source formatting.
schema_examples.selection_rationale: Example of a usable article whose text comes from raw local material.

schema_examples.cleaning_notes: Only warning or paywall stub was available locally.
schema_examples.full_text_quality_notes: No usable local full text is available; this article must be replaced before inputs are built.
schema_examples.selection_rationale: Example of an article that cannot enter model-facing inputs.
